title: Microsoft releases record patch that fixes more than 570 security vulnerabilities
summary: The update includes the fix for a Secure Boot vulnerability that has been active for a decade and flaws actively exploited by cybercriminals.

title: OpenAI prepares its first physical device: a screenless smart speaker with AI
summary: The voice assistant is shaping up as a direct competitor to Alexa with advanced generative artificial intelligence capabilities.

title: Researchers expose serious security vulnerabilities in Claude that allow stealing secrets and reading emails
summary: The flaws in Anthropic's assistant demonstrate how it is possible to obtain sensitive personal data and access linked services such as Gmail.

title: New York becomes the first U.S. state to ban the construction of large data centers
summary: The one-year moratorium seeks to assess the energy and environmental impact of these infrastructures in the state.

title: DeepSeek negotiates a new $1.5 billion funding round before its possible IPO
summary: The Chinese AI startup seeks more capital just weeks after closing a historic $7 billion investment.

title: xAI's Grok programming tool uploaded entire user repositories to the cloud without explicit permission
summary: Elon Musk states that the already uploaded data will be deleted after the controversy over the privacy of developers' source code.

title: Apple releases public beta of iOS 27 with new AI-powered Siri
summary: Users can test the advanced Apple Intelligence features before the official release of the operating system.

title: DeepMind CEO calls for creation of an independent international body to regulate frontier AI
summary: Demis Hassabis advocates for building safety guardrails given the uncertainty about the future of artificial intelligence.

title: Intel invests $5.7 billion in its Ireland factory to increase production of its Xeon processors
summary: The investment aims to strengthen cutting-edge chip manufacturing in Europe using the Intel 3 process.

title: Elon Musk's Colossus 2 data center installed 59 natural gas turbines without required permits
summary: A report reveals that the installation emits thousands of tons of pollutants, affecting African American communities with high rates of lung disease.

title: Google redesigns its image search with artificial intelligence and a Pinterest-inspired layout
summary: The new feature generates AI images when no visual results are available and improves visual browsing.

title: The impact of data centers on electricity prices and job creation sparks intense global debate
summary: While data centers drive up energy consumption and prices, critics point out that the promise of jobs is not being fulfilled.

title: Flock surveillance camera network faces growing public and political scrutiny in the United States
summary: The Los Angeles Police Department will not renew the contract with the company, while links to political operatives are revealed and mass data collection is criticized.

title: Meta faces criticism for using artificial intelligence in layoffs and management of its engineers
summary: A lawsuit alleges that the company used AI to identify low-performing employees to be laid off, while limiting token usage per engineer is being considered.

title: Google, OpenAI, and Meta face a wave of lawsuits over the use of data in training their AI models
summary: The accusations range from copyright violations and trade secrets to abusive labor practices mediated by artificial intelligence.

title: Chinese memory maker CXMT gains ground by achieving compatibility with MSI's Intel 800 series motherboards
summary: Amid the RAM crisis, the Chinese company advances in the certification of its DDR5 modules for the global PC market.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 could have a 1080p OLED display while the retro accessory ecosystem grows
summary: Rumors point to an improvement in the console's image quality, while docks with nostalgic designs like the Nintendo 64 are already being sold.

title: Artificial intelligence raises alarms about its impact on minors: from virtual girlfriends to nude apps
summary: Studies and reports warn about the rise of young people's relationships with chatbots and the use of platforms like YouTube to distribute apps that generate fake intimate images.

title: Lenovo expands its catalog with a powerful workstation and a long-battery-life laptop
summary: The company launches a system with up to 1 TB of RAM and an RTX PRO GPU, along with an affordable laptop with over 30 hours of battery life.

title: Analysts debate whether the artificial intelligence race is moving beyond frontier model development
summary: While the industry rethinks its priorities, Meta emerges as a silent competitor with strategic advantages in the race toward superintelligence.
